name: byeGPT Studio
description: Query your personal ChatGPT knowledge archive via the byeGPT PowerApp API. Lets Claude or Codex interact with your NotebookLM notebooks, search your conversation history, and retrieve AI-generated artifacts.

endpoints.name: health
endpoints.description: Check whether the byeGPT backend is running.

endpoints.name: auth_status
endpoints.description: Check if the user is authenticated with Google / NotebookLM.

endpoints.name: auth_login
endpoints.description: Start a headless Playwright browser so the user can complete Google OAuth. Poll /auth/status to confirm completion.

endpoints.name: convert_export
endpoints.description: Convert a ChatGPT .zip or conversations.json export to Gemini-optimised Markdown files with NotebookLM Context Anchors.

max_size_mb.description: Max output file size in MB.

endpoints.name: generate_passport
endpoints.description: Generate a Digital Passport (AI communication profile) from a ChatGPT export.

endpoints.name: upload_to_notebooklm
endpoints.description: Batch-upload converted Markdown files to NotebookLM (up to 50 sources per notebook).

output_dir.description: Path to the folder containing Markdown files.

endpoints.name: get_mind_map
endpoints.description: Generate and return a JSON mind map for the specified NotebookLM notebook.

endpoints.name: get_audio_overview
endpoints.description: Generate and stream an Audio Overview MP3 for the specified notebook.

endpoints.name: get_slides
endpoints.description: Generate and return a list of presentation slides for the specified notebook.

endpoints.name: revise_slide
endpoints.description: Send a revision prompt for a specific slide and receive the updated slide.

examples.description: Ask my archive about a recipe saved in 2023

steps.note: Inspect mind map for food/recipe nodes

examples.description: Convert my ChatGPT export and upload to NotebookLM
